2604.03044.title: JoyAI-LLM Flash: Advancing Mid-Scale LLMs with Token Efficiency
2604.03044.paper_summary: We introduce JoyAI-LLM Flash, an efficient Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model designed to redefine the trade-off between strong performance and token efficiency in the sub-50B parameter regime. JoyAI-LLM Flash is pretrained on a massive corpus of 20 trillion tokens and further optimized through a rigorous post-training pipeline, including supervised fine-tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), and large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) across diverse environments. To improve token efficiency, JoyAI-LLM Flash strategically balances \emph{thinking} and \emph{non-thinking} cognitive modes and introduces FiberPO, a novel RL algorithm inspired by fibration theory that decomposes trust-region maintenance into global and local components, providing unified multi-scale stability control for LLM policy optimization. To enhance architectural sparsity, the model comprises 48B total parameters while activating only 2.7B parameters per forward pass, achieving a substantially higher sparsity ratio than contemporary industry leading models of comparable scale. To further improve inference throughput, we adopt a joint training-inference co-design that incorporates dense Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) and Quantization-Aware Training (QAT). We release the checkpoints for both JoyAI-LLM-48B-A3B Base and its post-trained variants on Hugging Face to support the open-source community.
2604.03044.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 JoyAI-LLM Flash，一種高效的混合專家（MoE）語言模型，旨在重新定義在小於 50B 參數範疇內強性能與令牌效率之間的權衡。JoyAI-LLM Flash 在一個龐大的 20 兆令牌語料庫上進行預訓練，並通過嚴格的後訓練流程進一步優化，包括監督式微調（SFT）、直接偏好優化（DPO）以及在多樣環境中進行的大規模強化學習（RL）。為了提高令牌效率，JoyAI-LLM Flash 策略性地平衡了 \emph{思考} 和 \emph{非思考} 認知模式，並引入了 FiberPO，一種受纖維理論啟發的新型 RL 算法，將信任區域維護分解為全局和局部組件，為 LLM 策略優化提供統一的多尺度穩定性控制。為了增強架構稀疏性，該模型總共包含 48B 參數，但每次前向傳遞僅激活 2.7B 參數，實現了比當前同類規模的行業領先模型更高的稀疏比。為了進一步提高推理吞吐量，我們採用了一種聯合訓練-推理共同設計，該設計結合了密集的多令牌預測（MTP）和量化感知訓練（QAT）。我們在 Hugging Face 上發布了 JoyAI-LLM-48B-A3B Base 及其後訓練變體的檢查點，以支持開源社區。
2604.03044.author: Aichen Cai et.al.
